items.summary: Revert the InitialLoadingScreen component to the original Bond-themed gun barrel loading animation and intro sequence, removing any extended duration changes introduced in recent versions. Restore the original minimum display time, animation timing, and visual elements.

Add a controls reference panel to the start/mission screen that displays the game controls (WASD movement, mouse aim/shoot, Space to jump or interact, and any other relevant keybindings) so players can see them before starting the game.
